title: hedeoma drummondii var. drummondii
intro: Hedeoma drummondii var. drummondii, also known as Drummond's pennyroyal or American pennyroyal, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of this plant include relief from digestive issues, such as nausea and indigestion, as well as its potential to ease menstrual cramps and reduce anxiety. Hedeoma drummondii var. drummondii can be prepared as a tea, infused oil, or dried herb, making it a versatile and accessible addition to herbal remedies.
